scope.summary: Builds and deploys Power Apps model-driven app generative pages, creates Dataverse entities when needed, creates model-driven apps, generates React and Fluent UI code, deploys via PAC CLI, and verifies in browser.

bundledScripts.purpose: Node.js helpers for Dataverse authentication, table creation, column creation, relationship creation, record creation, solution creation, and Playwright MCP launch.

connectors.name: Dataverse
connectors.riskNotes: Used for entities, records, schema generation, model-driven app pages, and deployment targets.

powerPlatformGovernance.dlpImpact: High. Workflow can create Dataverse schema and deploy generated pages to model-driven apps.

exceptions: Current generated UI uses Fluent UI V9 rather than EDS. Need to document whether platform constraints require Fluent UI or whether EDS can be used.

blockers: Internal owner and support channel are not assigned.
Skills, agents, scripts, and MCP configuration are not reviewed against Equinor guidance.
Production-system interaction is possible by default through Dataverse schema creation, app creation, deployment, and browser verification workflows.
Power Platform zone mapping and data classification ceiling are not documented.
EDS position is unresolved because generated UI currently uses Fluent UI V9.
Technology Radar status is unknown for Fluent UI and Playwright.
GitHub Copilot marketplace manifest is missing.

evidence.summary: Documents Dataverse entity creation, app creation, React and Fluent UI code generation, deployment, and browser verification.
Contains Node.js scripts that require security and behavior review before publication.

notes: Initial review record only. This record intentionally defers publication until detailed review evidence exists.
